posts.description: Panoptes checks any website for phishing, malware, domain age, missing security headers, IP location and SSL status. Powered by Google Safe Browsing. Free preview scan, no account needed.

posts.name: OpenFork.video
posts.tagline: Why AI video workflows should be packaged like apps.
posts.description: I’m building OpenFork because I kept running into the same boring wall when testing new AI video/audio/image workflows: CUDA issues, Python packages fighting each other, and the fear of breaking a ComfyUI setup. It’s an opensource desktop client and python client + web workspace that runs AI media workflows in prebuilt Docker containers. The goal is simple: pick a workflow, let the client pull the right image, run it on your NVIDIA GPU, and send back into your project. No configuration needed.

posts.name: Klunk – Reliability Scores for Used Cars
posts.tagline: Reliability scores on every used car listing
posts.description: Klunk = a 0-100 reliability score for every model year of every car, built on NHTSA's owner-complaint database. What's different: • Per-year scoring (not averaged across a nameplate's lifetime) • Chrome extension overlays scores on Carvana/AutoTrader/Cars.com listings as you shop • Every score traces back to actual NHTSA complaint IDs • Free, no signup, no paywall Edmunds tells you "the Honda Civic is reliable." Klunk tells you which year of Civic actually is.

posts.name: Aura File Transfer Manager
posts.tagline: Precision file mobility for demanding workflows.
posts.description: Aura File Transfer Manager is a modern, high-performance replacement for Windows' built-in file copier. Transfer up to 10 files simultaneously without freezing your PC. Pause and resume any job individually, verify file integrity with quick or full checksums, and resolve conflicts with a single click. Seamlessly integrates with Ctrl+V and context menus. Stay in control with real-time speed, ETA, and per-file progress. No ads, no paywalls – just fast, reliable file operations.

posts.name: AirTranslate
posts.tagline: Live captions and translation for Mac audio
posts.description: Open-source macOS app that captures system audio, transcribes it live, and translates it into readable side-by-side text or floating captions. Apple frameworks are the default; GPT realtime modes are optional when you bring your own OpenAI API key.

posts.name: Me, Myself & AI - Music Platform
posts.tagline: The first platform dedicated entirely to AI-generated music
posts.description: Me, Myself & AI is the first dedicated platform for AI-generated music, creating a comprehensive ecosystem where creators, fans, curators, and promoters share in financial success. Using its native Melanin Tokens, the platform facilitates a unique music economy through staking, streaming, and real-time community interaction.

posts.name: My Days
posts.tagline: Record you day in seconds, not minutes.
posts.description: Most journaling apps: write essays daily 😵‍💫 My Days: Tap a mood ± activity → done ⚡ (close anytime, we’ve got it auto-saved) 🔒 Your data stays yours Private by default. Nothing sold. Full control. 💸 No subscriptions. Ever ✨ More than just a journal 📸 Images & voice notes 📍 Location & weather tracking ✍️ Rich text notes Go beyond journaling with: ✅ Counters & habit tracking 📝 Notes 📅 Planner 🎯 The goal? Everything about your day together without scattered data across 5 apps.

posts.name: bitewise
posts.tagline: Understand your food better
posts.description: Bitewise helps people understand what they eat without turning nutrition tracking into a chore. Simply scan a meal to instantly get calories, protein, ingredients, and nutrition insights — whether it’s homemade food, restaurant meals, snacks, or global cuisines. Most calorie tracking apps rely on slow manual searches and outdated food databases. Bitewise is designed to feel faster, simpler, and more natural for everyday use.
